articles.author: Ryan King, Samuel Chamberlain
articles.title: Supreme Court rules Trump can turn back asylum seekers at US border in major immigration win - New York Post
articles.description: Immigration advocates had claimed that aliens should be considered to “arrive” in the US once they reached the border, regardless of whether they set foot on American soil.
articles.content: WASHINGTON The Supreme Court ruled Thursday that the Trump administration can turn away migrants who show up at the US-Mexico border before they apply for asylum, in a victory for the White House’s i… [+4505 chars]

articles.author: Piper Hudspeth Blackburn, Julia Benbrook
articles.title: What we know about Trump’s Great American State Fair - CNN
articles.description: The Trump administration’s 16-day-long Great American State Fair has begun, offering visitors to the National Mall in Washington, DC, the chance to visit pavilions showcasing every US state and territory.
